headline: Guy Says 'I'm Not Like Other Guys' Then Ghosts Her After 3 Dates, Proving He Is Exactly Like Other Guys
summary: His 'not like other guys' t-shirt is now being used as a rag.
fullBody: Jake Unoriginal spent 3 dates explaining how 'emotionally available' and 'different' he was. 'I'm not a player,' Jake insisted. He then ghosted her immediately after the third date. 'I just got busy,' Jake texted 2 weeks later. 'Very busy.' His ex has since framed his 'not like other guys' t-shirt as evidence. 'He was exactly like other guys,' she said. 'Worse, actually. Other guys didn't pretend.'
